shortDescription: Driving digital transformation at Hyatt by leading engineering teams to modernize platforms, automate operations, and deliver secure, scalable solutions for global hospitality.
responsibilities: Strategic AI Adoption & Governance: Driving the joint enterprise effort by evaluating pilot programs and synthesizing cross-functional feedback to inform long-term executive roadmaps.
Hackathon Coordination: Co-organized a high-impact internal hackathon that unified multi-disciplinary teams and aligned varying skill levels on AI implementation strategies.
Cloud Transition: Orchestrating the transition of legacy systems to cloud-native architectures using React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Kafka, and Snowflake, significantly improving global scalability.
Microservice Design: Designed a unified microservice layer integrating legacy Opera v5, Opera Cloud (OHIP), and loyalty platforms, successfully consolidating fragmented architectures.
Event-Driven Architecture: Architected event-driven systems using Kafka to reduce data latency across reservations, bookings, and service updates worldwide.
Global Monitoring: Established global monitoring via Datadog, implementing SLOs and alerting pipelines that accelerated incident detection and resolution.
Analytics Pipelines: Pioneered analytics pipelines leveraging Python and Snowflake to enable predictive upgrades and dynamic service recommendations.
Secure-by-Design Standards: Enforced strict secure-by-design standards, including PCI, PII, and WCAG compliance, while migrating critical integrations to serverless environments.

shortDescription: Driving digital transformation at Hyatt by leading engineering teams to modernize platforms, automate operations, and deliver secure, scalable solutions for global hospitality.
responsibilities: Strategic Modernization: Led migration from Node.js to React/Next.js and cloud (Opera V5 to OHIP), enabling scalable APIs and future-ready platforms.
Team Leadership: Managed and mentored an 8-member engineering team, fostering growth, inclusion, and technical excellence.
Process Automation: Developed dashboards (Pre-Arrivals, Group Arrivals, F&B) to automate workflows, enhancing efficiency and reducing workload by 20%.
Project Highlight – Pre-Arrivals Dashboard: Automated guest management with a React/Next.js dashboard (Azure, Datadog), improving real-time accuracy and cutting manual work by 20%.
System Integration: Streamlined data exchange by integrating 13+ internal/external systems, optimizing operations.
Security & Compliance: Led Azure AD MFA integration, ensuring PCI/PII compliance across all applications.
Observability: Implemented Datadog monitoring, enhancing incident response times by 30%.
DevOps Transformation: Optimized CI/CD processes by migrating to Datadog and GitLab, accelerating deployments.
Stakeholder Partnership: Collaborated with product, business, and vendors to align technical roadmaps with strategic business goals.
Platform Delivery: Delivered multiple internal platforms with a focus on performance, maintainability, and accessibility, increasing adoption among global operations teams.
Delivery Velocity: Enhanced engineering velocity through streamlined workflows, architecture patterns, and DevOps practices.
Cloud Optimization: Achieved ~20% infrastructure cost reduction through optimized architecture and cloud migration.
Quality Assurance: Established CI/CD adoption, code quality standards, and front-end/back-end design standardization with automated testing frameworks.
Scalable Architecture: Developed scalable UI and backend layers for internal tools, reducing page load times and improving user workflows.
Agile Delivery: Supported continuous delivery and accelerated feature releases through agile methodologies and modular architectures.

shortDescription: Transformed Tracfone’s digital presence by leading the migration from IBM Portal to a high-performance Angular SPA, enhancing user experience and site engagement.
responsibilities: Front-End Modernization: Redesigned and migrated web platforms, boosting performance and enabling mobile-first, responsive design.
Analytics & SEO: Integrated Google Analytics and Tag Manager, increasing site engagement and search visibility.
Automation: Developed modular Angular components and automated testing pipelines (Protractor, Karma/Jasmine), reducing regression testing time by 40%.
Global Collaboration: Worked with offshore teams to align code quality, testing standards, and deployment best practices.

shortDescription: Led digital transformation projects for Hasbro, managing large-scale website migrations and launching new digital brands in a fast-paced, Agile environment.
responsibilities: Global Content Delivery: Oversaw multilingual content deployment for 32+ locales, ensuring timely releases and compliance with accessibility and SEO standards.
Analytics & Accessibility: Integrated Omniture and Google Analytics for performance tracking; enforced WCAG compliance to enhance digital usability across devices.
Brand Launches: Designed and launched new digital brands, managing end-to-end development and deployment.
